Soooooo… Ladyhead number 5.. Okay today I sat down with the intention of NOT using a flesh palate and to maybe explore monochromatic stuff.
I found a blue I like, a custom black I made, and an off white color. It is a pretty amazing range,

Rio is one of the sweetest humans I’ve met in my whole life. Thank you for letting me to help tell your story. I’m gonna miss our sessions.

Diablo has to have some of the best art and aesthetic across all video games so I’ll always be stoked for a Diablo tattoo. Also I couldn’t get rid of that friggin glare for the life of me so bare with me while I figure out photo
